---
title: "Nairobi Runners Analysis"
---

Welcome to the project. Use the navigation bar above to:

- Read the **[Full Report](report.qmd)** with findings and methodology.
- Explore the **[Interactive Dashboard](https://agucharles.shinyapps.io/nairobi-runners/)** to filter and visualize the data yourself.

This site runs entirely in your browser—no server required.
